title: afrardisia haemantha
intro: Afrardisia haemantha, also known as the bleeding heart tree or tiger's eye, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its bark, which contains compounds that have been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments. The health benefits of Afrardisia haemantha include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain, swelling, and infections. Traditionally, the plant's bark is prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as teas, tonics, and creams.
